wrapped.headline: The All-Rounder
wrapped.tagline: Balanced across every workout. No single strength — because everything is a strength.

wrapped.headline: The Competitor
wrapped.tagline: Above average across the board. Solid all around.

wrapped.headline: The Grinder
wrapped.tagline: Shows up. Does the work. Never quits. That's what this is about.

wrapped.headline: The Silent Assassin
wrapped.tagline: Elite and consistent. No weak spots. The kind of athlete who makes it look easy.

wrapped.headline: Open Athlete
wrapped.tagline: Signed up, showed up, and finished all three workouts. That puts them ahead of most.
